mapper.select:
SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
AND e.resign_date IS NULL
AND e.member_role != 'ADMIN'
ORDER BY e.resign_date IS NOT NULL, e.resign_date ASC, e.emp_id ASC;

SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id
AND e.resign_date IS NULL
AND e.member_role != 'ADMIN'
AND e.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY e.resign_date IS NOT NULL, e.resign_date ASC, e.emp_id ASC;

SELECT e.*, d.name AS department_name, p.name AS position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, email, password, phone, img_url, department_id, position_id, base_salary, member_role, hire_date) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{imgUrl}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, (SELECT salary FROM position_salary WHERE position_id = #{positionId}), #{memberRole}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, img_url = #{imgUrl}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position_id = #{positionId}, member_role = #{memberRole}, base_salary = #{baseSalary} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET department_id = #{departmentId} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET position_id = #{positionId} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET member_role = 'SUSPENDED', resign_date = NOW() WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
UPDATE employee SET password = #{password} WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.select: SELECT base_salary FROM employee WHERE emp_id = #{empId}
SELECT db.bonus FROM employee e JOIN department_bonus db ON e.department_id = db.department_id WHERE e.emp_id = #{empId}
